race.comment: DEEP RESPECT (6) has been plying his trade in harder Saturday metro company and will appreciate the drop back in grade here. Watch for sharp improvement. DON'T STOP (5) boasts a win over this course and distance and strips fitter third-up from the break. In the mix on best figures. REJOICED (10) has shown good tactical speed in his last two, only to be run down late. Top fitness now and draws to go forward again. Will take some catching. OUR MAGNUS (4) has been below his best of late but shoulders strong peaks. Gets in light with the claim and if he can recapture his best, he'll be in the finish.
